plugins.name: claude-crew
plugins.description: Multi-team agent harness. Install profiles for mobile (Android/iOS), backend (API/DB/DevOps), QA (test strategy/automation), product (PRD/stories), data (pipelines/ML/SQL), or frontend (React/Vue/a11y). Each profile brings specialist agents, SDLC workflows, code review, and security guardrails. Teams share git/Jira/Scrum agents and a self-learning memory system.
